name: Can I get lawyer fees paid if I sue Perplexity and win?

mainEntity.name: Can I get lawyer fees paid if I sue Perplexity and win?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, Copyright Act awards attorney fees to prevailing parties, boosting small claims.[1][2] NYT seeks this.[2] Key factors: Strong case, registration. Courts discretionary but favor winners. NY precedent aids. Valuable for creators.
